rulings.Case Title: JOAN MAHONEY et al VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LTD et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JANUARY 18, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT WASHOE BUILDING SUPPLY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: JOAN MAHONEY et al VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LTD et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JANUARY 18, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. ASSUMING BURDEN SHIFTED, MURRAY DECLARATION CREATES TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. COURT CANNOT STRIKE MURRAY DECLARATION BECAUSE THERE IS NO SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE THAT HER NAME WAS WILLFULLY WITHHELD. IF PLAINTIFF VIOLATED PRESIDING JUDGE'S ORDER, THEN DEFENDANT CAN SEEK AND O.S.C. RE CONTEMPT. =(302/PHA/PB)
